brief_title: Long-term Follow-up of the TAM-01 Study and Pooled Analysis of Low-dose Tamoxifen Studies in Non-invasive or Microinvasive Breast Neoplasms
official_title: Long-term Follow-up of the TAM-01 Study, a Phase III Trial of Low-dose Tamoxifen, and Pooled Analysis of Three Studies in Breast DCIS, High-risk Lesions and Microinvasive Disease
